variants.name: optional relationship preserves unmatched source rows

vars.query: match (a:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.group = 'optional' optional match (a)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(b:TemplateNodeKind2) return a.name, b.name order by a.name

variants.name: chained optional match preserves null second-hop rows

vars.query: match (a:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.group = 'optional' optional match (a)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(b:TemplateNodeKind2) optional match (b)-[:TemplateEdgeKind2]->(c:TemplateNodeKind1) return a.name, b.name, c.name order by a.name

families.name: optional match where null row semantics

variants.name: optional where preserves rows when optional binding is rejected

vars.query: match (a:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.group = 'optional-filter' optional match (a)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(b:TemplateNodeKind2) where b.name = 'target' return a.name, b.name order by a.name

variants.name: chained optional where preserves null first-hop rows

vars.query: match (a:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.group = 'optional-filter' optional match (a)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(b:TemplateNodeKind2) where b.name = 'target' optional match (b)-[:TemplateEdgeKind2]->(c:TemplateNodeKind1) where c.name = 'tail' return a.name, b.name, c.name order by a.name

variants.name: optional where aggregate counts only accepted optional bindings

vars.query: match (a:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.group = 'optional-filter' optional match (a)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(b:TemplateNodeKind2) where b.name = 'target' return a.name, count(b) order by a.name
